message:
feat(fcp-protocol): export session module and improve golden vector tests

Wire up the fcp-protocol crate with proper module exports and
comprehensive dependencies for FCPS/FCPC session handling.

## Module Structure

lib.rs now properly declares and exports the session module:
```rust
mod session;
pub use session::*;
```

This exposes session establishment primitives:
- MeshSessionId: Unique session identifier
- SessionNonce: Cryptographic nonce for handshakes
- SessionCryptoSuite: Negotiated cipher suite
- SessionDirection: Initiator vs Responder
- derive_session_keys(): HKDF-based key derivation
- compute_session_mac(): Session-bound MAC computation
- encode/decode functions for Hello, Cookie, Ack messages

## New Dependencies (Cargo.toml)

Runtime dependencies:
- serde, ciborium: CBOR serialization for wire format
- blake3: Fast hashing for session binding
- hmac, sha2: HMAC-SHA256 for key derivation
- rand: Nonce generation
- subtle: Constant-time comparisons
- fcp-core, fcp-crypto, fcp-cbor, fcp-tailscale: FCP crates

Dev dependencies:
- serde_json, chrono, uuid, hex: Test utilities

## Test Improvements (session_golden_vectors.rs)

Enhanced golden vector tests with:
- Structured JSON test logging infrastructure
- Better test organization and naming
- Improved coverage of edge cases
- Machine-readable test output format

The session module provides the cryptographic foundation for
authenticated, encrypted mesh communication channels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
